# Text field filters

## Path includes work

```tasks
path includes work
```

## Folder does not include archive

```tasks
folder does not include archive
not done
```

## Root is projects

```tasks
root includes projects
```

## Filename regex matches sprint or bugs

```tasks
filename regex matches /sprint|bugs/
```

## Description includes "migrate"

```tasks
description includes migrate
```

## Backlink (host file) includes "web"

```tasks
backlink includes web
```
